commit.message:
test(usage-analysis): add unit tests for mergeUsageAnalysis, analyzeContextReferences, deriveConversationPatterns (#600)

Add 23 unit tests covering the three synchronous/pure-function layers of
usageAnalysis.ts: mergeUsageAnalysis (period accumulation, MCP tool merging,
model-switching stats, byKind context tracking), analyzeContextReferences (all
13 reference type patterns, accumulation, case-insensitivity), and
deriveConversationPatterns (0/1/multi-request session patterns). Tests use
inline object construction with no mocks or external dependencies.

commit.message:
fix(workout): load exercises with sets/reps/weight when starting workout (#497)

When tapping "Start Workout" from Home, the ActiveWorkout screen was loading empty.
The root cause: HomeViewModel didn't call activePlanStore.setPendingWorkoutDay() before
navigating to ActiveWorkout, so ActiveWorkoutViewModel.loadPendingWorkoutDay() had no
data to populate.

Fixed both QuickStartWorkout and StartTodayWorkout events to set the pending workout day
before navigation. Now exercises load with:
- Pre-filled sets count from the plan
- Smart defaults for weight/reps from workout history
- Fallback to sensible defaults (plan reps range) when no history exists

Closes #488

Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
test(workspace-helpers): add unit tests + fix off-by-one in extractCustomAgentName (#599)

Add 36 unit tests covering getModeType, getRepoDisplayName, parseGitRemoteUrl,
isMcpTool, normalizeMcpToolName, extractMcpServerName, extractCustomAgentName,
and getEditorNameFromRoot. All functions are pure string transformations so tests
use inline fixtures with no mocks.

Also fix a pre-existing bug discovered by the tests: extractCustomAgentName was
calling slice(0, -10) to strip '.agent.md' but that suffix is only 9 characters,
causing the last character of the agent name to be silently dropped.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(onboarding): make goal/experience/frequency selectors interactive (#496)

The selectors in the onboarding flow were not responding to user taps.
The issue was that onClick handlers were applied as .clickable() modifiers
instead of being passed to the GlassmorphicCard's onClick parameter.

Changed GoalCard and FrequencyCard to pass onClick to GlassmorphicCard
instead of applying .clickable modifier, which ensures the Card's internal
onClick handler is properly wired.

Closes #487

Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add crash types 14-18: JavascriptInterface, NativeMethod, WorkManager, CustomView, KotlinObject + JitPack publishing setup

- Type 14: JAVASCRIPT_INTERFACE_STRIPPED — WebView @JavascriptInterface methods renamed by R8
  → JavaScript calls like window.bridge.getUserName() fail at runtime
- Type 15: NATIVE_METHOD_RENAMED — Class with JNI external methods renamed by R8
  → UnsatisfiedLinkError: native library JNI signatures no longer match
- Type 16: WORKMANAGER_WORKER_STRIPPED — Worker subclass renamed by R8
  → WorkManager ClassNotFoundException on job execution
- Type 17: CUSTOM_VIEW_STRIPPED — Custom View class renamed by R8
  → LayoutInflater InflateException: ClassNotFoundException
- Type 18: KOTLIN_OBJECT_INSTANCE_REMOVED — Kotlin object INSTANCE field removed/renamed by R8
  → NoSuchFieldError via reflection / objectInstance

New files:
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/models/WebBridgeHandler.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/models/ImageProcessor.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/models/DataSyncWorker.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/models/CustomProgressView.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/models/ConfigManager.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/crashes/JavascriptInterfaceCrash.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/crashes/NativeMethodCrash.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/crashes/WorkManagerCrash.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/crashes/CustomViewCrash.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/crashes/KotlinObjectCrash.kt
- proguard-protect-plugin/src/main/kotlin/.../analyzers/JavascriptInterfaceAnalyzer.kt
- proguard-protect-plugin/src/main/kotlin/.../analyzers/NativeMethodAnalyzer.kt
- proguard-protect-plugin/src/main/kotlin/.../analyzers/WorkManagerAnalyzer.kt
- proguard-protect-plugin/src/main/kotlin/.../analyzers/CustomViewAnalyzer.kt
- proguard-protect-plugin/src/main/kotlin/.../analyzers/KotlinObjectAnalyzer.kt
- jitpack.yml
- PUBLISH.md

Other changes:
- Add 5 new IssueType values to ProguardIssue.kt enum
- Register 5 new analyzers in PostBuildAnalysisTask.kt
- Add crossReferenceWithMapping handlers for all 5 new types
- Add HtmlReportGenerator icons and labels for new types
- Add maven-publish plugin to proguard-protect-plugin/build.gradle.kts
- Add androidx.work:work-runtime-ktx:2.9.0 to app dependencies
- Add commented-out fix rules in app/proguard-rules.pro for types 14-18
- Add 5 new crash buttons to MainActivity

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- implement GET /auth/me using Bearer authentication\n- decode JWT access token and validate token subject\n- reject missing, invalid, or revoked tokens with 401\n- resolve authenticated user profile via AuthService.get_user_by_id\n- return 404 when token subject user is not found\n- add dedicated /me endpoint unit tests covering success and auth edge cases

- document JWT token system with HS256 and key rotation support
- document complete auth workflow (signup, login, logout, profile)
- document token revocation using jti-based denylist

commit.message:
Preserve dsize across layout finalization for chained `[[no_unique_address]]` (#1235)

* Add chained no_unique_address regression

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/GregorGullwi/FlashCpp/sessions/26388c88-8f2a-4c21-842e-c6677e927452

Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>

* Resolve chained no_unique_address issue

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/GregorGullwi/FlashCpp/sessions/26388c88-8f2a-4c21-842e-c6677e927452

Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>

* Removed stddef.h include from test file

* Fix: update layout_data_size when adding vptr in finalize()

When has_vtable is true, total_size was incremented by 8 for the vptr
but layout_data_size was not. The new two-parameter finalizeLayoutSize()
passes layout_data_size as raw_layout_size, so the stale value caused
polymorphic structs to report an incorrect (too small) data extent.
This could allow [[no_unique_address]] tail-padding reuse to overlap
the vptr region with subsequent members.

* Preserve layout_data_size in recalculateLayout() and finalizeWithBases()

Pass the tracked layout_data_size (data extent) separately from
current_offset (object extent) so chained [[no_unique_address]]
tail-padding reuse works for structs with base classes.

* docs: document premature layout_is_complete invariant in KNOWN_ISSUES.md

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Gregor <gregor.gullwi@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: devin-ai-integration[bot] <158243242+devin-ai-integration[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: FlashCpp
repository.description: Flash C++ Compiler

commit.message:
Disambiguate elaborated type-specifier variable declarations from class/struct definitions (#1237)

* Add elaborated type specifier disambiguation for struct/class/union variable declarations

Adds looks_like_elaborated_type_variable_declaration() lookahead that disambiguates
between struct/class/union definitions (struct Foo { ... }) and elaborated type specifier
variable declarations (struct Foo f = { 1, 2 }) at both statement and top-level scope.

This fixes parsing of patterns like 'struct timespec __ts = { ... }' in <semaphore> and
similar local variable declarations in standard library headers.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/GregorGullwi/FlashCpp/sessions/809df1ad-d593-4f69-af00-fb4ce71a5507

Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update README_STANDARD_HEADERS.md with comprehensive retest results (2026-04-11)

- <span> now compiles successfully (was Codegen Error)
- <thread>, <semaphore>, <condition_variable>, <execution>, <generator>, <mutex>
  all improved from Parse Error/Crash to Compile/Codegen Error
- Updated all timings and error descriptions
- Noted regressions in <any>, <utility>, <exception>, <numeric>, etc.
- Identified stl_pair.h:308 swap as the single biggest remaining blocker

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/GregorGullwi/FlashCpp/sessions/809df1ad-d593-4f69-af00-fb4ce71a5507

Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>

* Apply elaborated type disambiguation in namespace body parsing

The top-level and statement-level paths were already patched, but the
namespace-body path at parse_namespace() was missing the same check.
Without this, 'struct Foo f;' inside a namespace body would still be
misparsed as a struct definition.

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: devin-ai-integration[bot] <158243242+devin-ai-integration[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
examples: remove broken, redundant, and premature examples

Remove 19 examples that were broken (parse/packaging failures),
redundant with other examples, or premature (unreleased features):

Broken (no resources/ dir or parse errors):
- batch-processing, complex-workflow, control-flow
- hybrid-expressions, optional-braces, docker-config
- webserver-proxy, webserver-static
- scraper-native, search-local-files, search-web-native (schema errors)
- embedding-rag (resource validation failure)
- shell-exec (no kdeps.pkg.yaml)

Premature (unreleased features):
- federation-demo (Federation not released, no workflow.yaml)
- shared-workflow (pattern undocumented, no workflow.yaml)

Redundant:
- component-komponent, components-advanced, components-unpacked
  (too similar; component-setup-teardown covers the concept)
- cv-matcher-online (same use case as cv-matcher-deepseek)

Keeping 27 examples covering all major features.

commit.message:
fix: correct AMS HT tray_id encoding in set_ams_filament_setting

AMS HT chip_id=128. Standard AMS tray_id = ams_id * 4 + slot, but
AMS HT tray_id = chip_id + slot (128 + slot). Previously produced 512
for slot 0 instead of the correct 128.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix: use next/server after() for Slack interaction background work

Fire-and-forget (.catch) doesn't work on Vercel — the serverless
function is killed immediately after the response, so the rating
was never saved, the message never updated, and the next item
never dispatched. Using after() keeps the function alive to
complete the work after returning 200 to Slack.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix: remove plain_text_input from message (unsupported by Slack)

plain_text_input is only supported in modals/home tabs, not in messages.

to sendSlackDM for future debugging.

security: fix all open Dependabot + CodeQL alerts

Dependabot fixes:
- waitress: 2.1.2 → 3.0.0 (Docker/3.8), 3.0.2 (host/3.10)
  Fixes CRITICAL CVE (race condition) and HIGH CVE (DoS)
  Note: Docker 3.0.0 is max for Python 3.8, health server is
  internal-only so residual risk is minimal
- requests: 2.31.0 → 2.32.4 (Docker/3.8), 2.33.0 (host/3.10)
  Fixes .netrc leak, verify=False, temp file reuse CVEs
- flask: 3.0.3 (Docker/3.8), 3.1.3 (host/3.10)
  Fixes Vary: Cookie header CVE

CodeQL fixes:
- provision.py: Mask hostname and device_id in log output
  to avoid clear-text logging of sensitive data

commit.message:
Fix: dispatch next Slack item after rating, not after modal submit

When a reviewer clicks 'Skip' on the comment modal, Slack sends no
callback, so dispatchNextForReviewer was never called — the reviewer
got stuck with no more items. Now dispatch happens right after the
rating action completes, regardless of modal interaction.

* feat: Add initial implementation of Bot Framework library

- Created pyproject.toml for project configuration and dependencies.
- Implemented core components including BotApplication, BotAuth, and TokenManager.
- Added HTTP client for handling requests to Bot Framework services.
- Developed conversation management features in ConversationClient.
- Introduced core activity models for handling messages and activities.
- Implemented middleware support for processing activities.
- Added user token management functionality with UserTokenClient.
- Created unit tests for BotApplication and CoreActivity functionalities.

* refactor: update Python directory structure to use 'python/packages/botas'

* feat: Implement Bot Framework middleware and client libraries

- Add bot-auth-middleware for validating Bot Framework Bearer tokens.
- Introduce bot-http-client for making authenticated HTTP requests to the Bot Framework REST API.
- Create conversation-client for managing conversations, sending activities, and retrieving members.
- Define core-activity types and utility functions for activity handling.
- Implement i-turn-middleware interface for cross-cutting concerns in activity processing.
- Develop user-token-client for managing user tokens and OAuth sign-in flows.
- Add logger utility for consistent logging across the library.
- Implement token-manager for acquiring Bot Framework access tokens using MSAL.
- Create tests for core-activity functionality.
- Add TypeScript configuration for the project.

* refactor: update folder structure and paths across documentation and project files

* refactor: reorder imports in bot_application.py and __init__.py for consistency

* refactor: reorganize dotnet project structure and migrate ChannelAccount and Conversation classes to CoreActivity namespace

managed by admin dashboard.

commit.message:
feat: upload .engine files to Supabase Storage after TensorRT conversion

After converting ONNX → TensorRT, the .engine file is uploaded to
Supabase Storage as a device-specific backup. Storage path includes
hardware model and TensorRT version for clear identification:

  models/engines/{jetson-orin-nano}_trt{10.3}/{leaf_type}_student.engine

Device info auto-detected from /proc/device-tree/model and dpkg.
Upload is best-effort — failure doesn't block setup.

NOTE: .engine files are NOT portable across GPU architectures.
Each device must either convert ONNX locally or download an engine
built on identical hardware + TensorRT version.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
test(lint): cover locate_json_key None path and check_file malformed JSON

Add tests for two previously uncovered branches in the hook lint rules:

1. hook_legacy_event.rs line 101: the Err(_) arm in check_file() that
   silently skips malformed JSON was never exercised.

2. hook_legacy_event.rs / hook_unknown_event.rs: locate_json_key()
   returns None when the JSON key in the raw file is written using
   a Unicode escape (e.g. "St\u006fp" → "Stop"). serde_json resolves
   the escape when parsing, but locate_json_key searches the raw bytes
   for the literal key string and cannot find it — resulting in a
   diagnostic with line=None, col=None, end_col=None.

Both hook_legacy_event.rs and hook_unknown_event.rs now report 100%
branch coverage.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: GUI service X11 auth — add XAUTHORITY + xhost for display access

systemctl start agrikd-gui and desktop shortcut failed silently because:
1. XAUTHORITY env var was missing — X11 server rejected connections
2. xhost didn't grant access to the agrikd service user

Now setup_jetson.sh:
- Auto-detects XAUTHORITY path (gdm, home dir variants)
- Runs xhost +SI:localuser:agrikd for X11 access
- Sets QT_QPA_PLATFORM=xcb for PyQt5
- Adds /run/user to ReadWritePaths for X11 socket access

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: auto-resolve CWD to install root for engine path resolution

Both gui_app.py and main.py now auto-detect the install root on startup:
- Host layout: /opt/agrikd/app/main.py → CWD = /opt/agrikd/
- Docker layout: /app/main.py → CWD = /app/

This ensures relative paths in config.json (models/*, config/*, data/*)
resolve correctly regardless of where the script is launched from.

Previously, running 'python3 /opt/agrikd/app/gui_app.py' from any
directory other than /opt/agrikd/ would fail to find engine files.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Send Slack review items one at a time per reviewer

- Add dispatchNextForReviewer() in assignment-dispatch.ts:
  checks for in-flight 'sent' items, sends only the next pending one
- Update /api/slack/send: sends 1 item per reviewer instead of all at once
- Update /api/slack/interactions: after comment modal submission,
  automatically dispatches the reviewer's next pending item
- Fix Slack 3-second timeout: fire handlers without awaiting

commit.message:
Reorganize project structure and fix image references

Phase 1-8 Complete:
- Create new directory structure (pages, _drafts, content/posts, content/images)
- Move pages: videos.markdown -> pages/videos.md, about.markdown -> pages/about.md
- Reorganize images from flat /images/ to /content/images/shared/
- Create new layouts: _layouts/post.html, _layouts/page.html
- Update _config.yml with defaults for post and page layouts
- Fix all image references in posts (/images/ -> /content/images/shared/)
- Update navigation links to new pages/ folder
- Build verified: all posts and pages render correctly

New Structure:
- _posts/          - Blog post markdown (clean, layout-only)
- pages/           - Static pages (About, Videos)
- _drafts/         - Work-in-progress posts
- content/posts/   - Future: post-specific assets
- content/images/  - Centralized image storage
- _layouts/        - post.html, page.html for consistent styling

Benefits:
✓ Scalable: Easy to add 50+ more posts
✓ Organized: Images with content in centralized location
✓ Maintainable: Clear folder hierarchy
✓ Future-proof: Ready for galleries, attachments, etc.

commit.message:
fix(browser): install chrome-for-testing and fix dubious ownership

playwright-cli@0.1.7 requires chrome-for-testing (not the base image's
bundled Chromium). Add a build step to install it into /ms-playwright.

Also add git safe.directory config to prevent 'dubious ownership' errors
when the container user differs from the clone owner.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add Employee module with separate PostgreSQL schema (#15)

Add WarpBusiness.Employees class library project with:
- Employee entity model with standard HR fields (name, email, hire date,
  department, job title, employment status/type, org hierarchy via ManagerId)
- EmployeeDbContext with HasDefaultSchema("employees") for schema isolation
- EmployeeDbInitializer (IHostedService) for automatic migration on startup
- CRUD DTOs (CreateEmployeeRequest, UpdateEmployeeRequest, EmployeeResponse)
- Minimal API endpoints under /api/employees (list, get, create, update, delete)
- Auto-generated employee numbers (EMP00001, EMP00002, etc.) per tenant
- Tenant-scoped data access via X-Tenant-Id header
- Self-referencing ManagerId FK with SetNull delete behavior
- InitialCreate EF Core migration for the employees schema

Wired into the API project:
- EmployeeDbContext registered on same warpdb connection string
- EmployeeDbInitializer registered as hosted service
- Employee endpoints mapped in Program.cs
- Project added to solution file

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: Demo Plan Mode backend (Phase 1)

Add the backend infrastructure for AI-powered demo generation:

- src/demo-plan-prompts.ts: prompt templates with DemoGod JSON schema,
  self-demo instructions, and Playwright spec boilerplate
- POST /api/demos/save: save generated demo JSON with schema validation
- POST /api/specs/save: save generated Playwright specs to tests/generated/
- WS generate_demo_plan: constructs specialized prompt from target/format/
  description and sends to Copilot for generation
- WS save_demo_plan: persists generated output as demo JSON or Playwright
  spec, returns run command for Playwright specs
- .gitignore: add tests/generated/

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
